title: dashboardServer.ts + SSE event stream
description: Extend fedServer with /dashboard/* routes per spec §API. SSE handler at /dashboard/events with typed events (session.changed, audit.flagged, doctor.tick, peer.online/offline, cost.tick, summary.updated). Heartbeat every 15s. Static serve dist/dashboard/. Localhost-only refuses external.

context.text: Partial prerequisite landed during T-DASH-001 hardening: sweech dashboard now serves dist/dashboard, /dashboard/state, /dashboard/sessions, and /dashboard/events with session.changed + heartbeat from 127.0.0.1. Full fedServer /dashboard/* typed events from spec remain open.

Implemented dashboardServer.ts and wired sweech serve/startDashboard to serve React dashboard assets plus /dashboard/state, /dashboard/sessions filters, and /dashboard/events SSE. Proof: npm test -- --runInBand = 95 suites passed, 2341 passed, 5 skipped; npm run build passed; npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm audit found 0 vulnerabilities; Swift build passed; E2E daemon curl passed; screenshot saved at ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/dashboard-fedserver-T-DASH-005-2026-05-20.png.

Final review proof after amended fixes: code/security/integration reviews completed; fixed SSE cleanup idempotency, invalid status 400s, unserializable SSE payload handling, and browser fetch-metadata origin behavior. Codex adversarial review via CODEX_HOME=/Users/luke/.codex-pole codex exec reported no blocking findings. Final gates: npm test -- --runInBand = 95 suites passed, 2345 tests passed, 5 skipped, 2350 total; npm run build passed; npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm audit --audit-level=moderate found 0 vulnerabilities; cd macos-menubar/SweechBar && swift build passed; git diff --check passed. E2E: live dist/cli.js serve returned dashboard state/session/SSE 200, bad Host 403, raw no-Origin API 403. Screenshot: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/dashboard-fedserver-T-DASH-005-final-2026-05-20.png.
